flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Diego City College fell 32% between 2009 and 2010 (5.8% → 3.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Diego City College rose 31% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.7k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Diego City College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Diego City College rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($586 → $658).
